name: Athletics
description: Lifting, pushing, pulling, jumping, running, and swimming. Used for physical exertion, climbing, and swimming.

name: Barter
description: Buying and selling, negotiating prices, and making deals with traders.

name: Big Guns
description: Using heavy weapons such as miniguns, Fat Mans, and gatling lasers.

name: Energy Weapons
description: Using energy-based firearms like laser guns, plasma guns, and gauss weaponry.

name: Explosives
description: Using, throwing, placing, and detonating explosive devices like grenades and mines.

name: Lockpick
description: Opening locks without the key, picking safes and locked doors.

name: Medicine
description: Healing people, stabilizing the dying, administering chems, and treating radiation poisoning.

name: Melee Weapons
description: Fighting with bats, clubs, knives, boards, wrenches, and sledges.

name: Pilot
description: Operating vehicles, from buggies and motorcycles to Vertibirds and tanks.

name: Repair
description: Fixing stuff, crafting things, building machines, and modifying weapons.

name: Science
description: Hacking computers, programming robots, and brewing chems.

name: Small Guns
description: Shooting with pistols, rifles, and shotguns.

name: Sneak
description: Moving quietly, staying hidden, and avoiding detection.

name: Speech
description: Making friends, influencing people, and lying to them if you have to.

name: Survival
description: Foraging, hunting, cooking, and enduring the wastes.

name: Throwing
description: Launching weapons from your hands, like spears or knives.

name: Unarmed
description: Fighting without a weapon by making unarmed attacks.
